# BP-142 negative: the expanded sqlx query is rebound before execution.
lang: go
file: BP-142-safe.go
variant: sqlx-db
---
package sample

import "github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"

type User struct{}

func loadUsers(db *sqlx.DB, ids []int) ([]User, error) {
	query, args, err := sqlx.In("SELECT id FROM users WHERE id IN (?)", ids)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	query = db.Rebind(query)
	var users []User
	err = db.Select(&users, query, args...)
	return users, err
}
